justification: The diff correctly updates dependencies to Jakarta EE 10/Spring 6/Hibernate 6 and replaces javax.* imports with jakarta.* equivalents, while also modernizing Spring MVC annotations (@GetMapping/@PostMapping). However, it does not leverage any Java 21-specific language features (records, pattern matching, virtual threads, etc.), limiting the idiomatic score. The changes are coherent and focused solely on the migration without spurious churn.
